settings.heading: Return & Exchange Policy
settings.subheading: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase.
settings.content:
Return Policy

We offer a 7-day return policy for all unused accessories. Please contact our support team to initiate a return within 7 days of delivery.

Refunds

Refunds will be processed within 5-7 working days to the original payment method once we receive the returned item.

Conditions

Items must be unused, in original packaging, and in resalable condition. Personalized or custom items may not be eligible for return.

How to Return

1. Contact us at support@pawflok.com with your order number.
2. We'll send you a return authorization and instructions.
3. Pack the item securely and ship it back.
4. Once received, we'll process your refund.
